title: OpenDataLoader PDF 2.5.0 conversion options
description: The complete public Node convert/CLI surface from upstream v2.5.0. Fixed and unavailable settings remain visible with adapter-specific reasons.

outputDir.title: Output directory
outputDir.description: Directory where upstream writes output files. The recorded value is the adapter-managed relative raw artifact directory.

availability.reason: The adapter owns the output directory so every generated file stays inside the immutable artifact root.

password.title: PDF password
password.description: Password used to open an encrypted PDF.

availability.reason: Plaintext passwords cannot be placed in immutable run options; a transient secret-reference channel is required first.

format.title: Output formats
format.description: Upstream output formats. This adapter requires both untouched JSON and Markdown for normalization and raw evidence.

availability.reason: Canonical normalization and native geometry evidence require the raw JSON output.
The current result bundle does not declare a raw text artifact.
The current result bundle does not declare or sanitize a raw HTML artifact.
The current result bundle does not declare the generated annotated-PDF artifact.
The adapter preserves Markdown as raw evidence and uses it during normalization.
The current result bundle does not declare the generated Tagged PDF artifact.
JSON and Markdown are mandatory raw artifacts; additional formats need explicit artifact contracts.

quiet.title: Quiet logging
quiet.description: Suppresses upstream console logging while Parser Arena emits its own structured job events.

availability.reason: Upstream logs are suppressed so adapter stdout remains a structured event stream.

contentSafetyOff.title: Disable content-safety filters
contentSafetyOff.description: Turns off one or more filters for hidden, off-page, tiny, or hidden-layer text.

availability.reason: Parser Arena keeps upstream prompt-injection and hidden-content protections enabled for untrusted PDFs.

sanitize.title: Sanitize sensitive data
sanitize.description: Replaces detected emails, phone numbers, IP addresses, credit cards, and URLs with placeholders.

keepLineBreaks.title: Keep line breaks
keepLineBreaks.description: Preserves original line breaks instead of merging lines into paragraphs.

replaceInvalidChars.title: Invalid-character replacement
replaceInvalidChars.description: Non-empty string used to replace invalid or unrecognized characters; upstream defaults to a space.

useStructTree.title: Use PDF structure tree
useStructTree.description: Uses native Tagged PDF structure for reading order and semantics when tags are present.

tableMethod.title: Table detection
tableMethod.description: Selects border-only detection or border detection augmented by clustering.

readingOrder.title: Reading order
readingOrder.description: Keeps PDF content-stream order or applies the XY-Cut++ layout algorithm.

markdownPageSeparator.title: Markdown page separator
markdownPageSeparator.description: Text inserted between Markdown pages; %page-number% is replaced with the 1-based page number. Empty means none.

markdownWithHtml.title: HTML inside Markdown
markdownWithHtml.description: Allows HTML tags in Markdown for structures such as tables with row spans.

textPageSeparator.title: Text page separator
textPageSeparator.description: Text inserted between plain-text pages; %page-number% is replaced with the page number.

availability.reason: Plain-text output is not part of this adapter's raw artifact contract.

htmlPageSeparator.title: HTML page separator
htmlPageSeparator.description: Markup inserted between HTML pages; %page-number% is replaced with the page number.

availability.reason: HTML output is not part of this adapter's raw artifact contract.

imageOutput.title: Image output
imageOutput.description: Controls whether images are omitted, embedded as Base64 data URIs, or written as external files.

availability.reason: This adapter profile keeps image extraction disabled.
Embedded images need output-size and memory limits before they can be retained safely.
External images require immutable image descriptors and preserved link references.
The current result bundle preserves JSON and Markdown only; image artifacts are not declared.

imageFormat.title: Image format
imageFormat.description: Encoding used for embedded or external extracted images.

availability.reason: Image format has no effect while image output is fixed off.

imageDir.title: External image directory
imageDir.description: Directory used for extracted image files when image output is external.

availability.reason: External images are disabled, and output paths must remain adapter-managed inside the artifact root.

pages.title: Pages
pages.description: Optional positive 1-based pages and ascending ranges, for example 1, 3, 5 - 7. Whitespace is accepted and recorded canonically.

includeHeaderFooter.title: Include headers and footers
includeHeaderFooter.description: Includes detected page headers and footers in generated output.

detectStrikethrough.title: Detect strikethrough
detectStrikethrough.description: Experimental detection that emits Markdown ~~ markers or HTML del tags.

hybrid.title: Hybrid backend
hybrid.description: Routes selected pages to an external AI backend; local Java-only processing is off.

availability.reason: This component is the deterministic local Java profile.
The component contains no Python Docling backend or model artifacts and declares network=none.
The required Hancom AI service is not part of this component and network access is disabled.
This reviewed component has no hybrid service and declares network=none.

hybridMode.title: Hybrid triage mode
hybridMode.description: Uses automatic page triage or sends every page to the selected backend.

availability.reason: Hybrid mode is fixed off because no backend service is configured.

hybridUrl.title: Hybrid server URL
hybridUrl.description: Overrides the selected hybrid backend's default server URL.

availability.reason: The component declares network=none and has no hybrid service connection.

hybridTimeout.title: Hybrid timeout
hybridTimeout.description: Backend request timeout in milliseconds as an upstream string; 0 means no timeout.

availability.reason: Hybrid mode is fixed off because no backend service is configured.

hybridFallback.title: Hybrid Java fallback
hybridFallback.description: Falls back to native Java processing when a hybrid backend request fails.

availability.reason: Hybrid mode is fixed off, so backend fallback cannot apply.

hybridHancomAiRegionlistStrategy.title: Hancom region-list strategy
hybridHancomAiRegionlistStrategy.description: Controls how Hancom AI DLA label 7 is interpreted.

availability.reason: This setting requires the unavailable hancom-ai hybrid backend.

hybridHancomAiOcrStrategy.title: Hancom OCR strategy
hybridHancomAiOcrStrategy.description: Uses stream text only, stream text with OCR fallback, or forced OCR.

availability.reason: This setting requires the unavailable hancom-ai hybrid backend.

hybridHancomAiImageCache.title: Hancom page-image cache
hybridHancomAiImageCache.description: Keeps Hancom AI page raster images in memory or temporary disk files.

availability.reason: This setting requires the unavailable hancom-ai hybrid backend.

toStdout.title: Write result to stdout
toStdout.description: Writes a single upstream output to stdout instead of creating files.

availability.reason: The adapter requires JSON and Markdown files for immutable raw artifacts and normalization.

threads.title: Page-processing threads
threads.description: Number of native Java page workers as an upstream string; values above 1 are experimental and can vary output.

availability.reason: Sequential processing is kept for stable, comparable parser output.
